project: Medical Document Intelligence Pipeline with LLM & RAG
description: End-to-end LLM pipeline that processes medical documents, extracts clinical entities, enables semantic search, and monitors output quality with hallucination detection.

phases.name: Foundation & Document Ingestion
phases.theme: PDF ingestion, OCR, text extraction, document schemas

phases.name: LLM Processing with Ollama
phases.theme: Ollama integration, summarization, entity extraction, classification

phases.name: Vector Store & RAG System
phases.theme: ChromaDB, embeddings, semantic search, RAG pipeline

phases.name: FastAPI & Query Interface
phases.theme: REST API, query engine, document Q&A, result ranking

phases.name: Quality Monitoring & Hallucination Detection
phases.theme: LLM output scoring, faithfulness checks, drift detection, alerts

phases.name: Hardening, Tests & Documentation
phases.theme: Integration tests, load tests, full docs, security, final polish
